title: AI for Complete Beginners Guide | Plain English AI Tutorial PDF 52 Pages Instant Download
description:
AI feels overwhelming — until you have the right starting point. This 52-page plain-English guide walks you through AI from zero, no tech background needed.

You get 52 pages covering ChatGPT, Midjourney, Claude, and Gemini — with step-by-step walkthroughs, real examples, and a beginner action plan.

Learn to use AI to save time at work, spark creativity, and automate repetitive tasks in your first week.

Instant delivery after purchase — download immediately and start reading today.

Files included: PDF (mobile-friendly, printable), quick-start checklist.

Click Add to Cart and start your AI journey today.
category: Craft Supplies & Tools > Patterns & How To > Tutorials & Instructional

pricingStrategy.priceJustification: Premium over competitor average justified by 52-page depth, multi-tool coverage, and plain-English accessibility. Beginner guides command higher prices due to breadth of value delivered. Launch price drives social proof.
